verse_text: Afterward all the children of Israel came near, and he gave them as commandments all that the Lord commanded him on Mount Sinai.

links.context: Those who become one with Christ receive this divine radiance revealed in Stephen's face. This is a preview of the glory all believers will share in the age to come ([[2CO.3:18]]). See also [[EXO.34:29]]-35.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: As God is light (4:3; [[PSA.103:2]]; [[1TI.6:16]]), so the angel coming down from heaven exudes a lingering radiance (see Moses in [[EXO.34:29]]-35).

symbolic.title: Heaven and Earth: A Spiritual Perspective
